/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_timing.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_timing.dir/test_timing.cpp.o -o test_timing  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/hdf5/serial ../libtdgl_core.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libumfpack.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libamd.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcholmod.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcolamd.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/hdf5/serial/libhdf5.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libdl.a -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/hdf5/serial/libhdf5_cpp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/hdf5/serial/libhdf5.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libdl.a -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/hdf5/serial/libhdf5_cpp.so /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
